title: Keeping EU Space safe and secure [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Ensuring the security of the EU Space Programme is a multi-front battle, one that involves protecting not only satellites in space, but also the signals and services those satellites provide. As the security gatekeeper of the EU Space Programme, EUSPA helps with both. For example, in this role EUSPA works to ensure that governmental users […]
